S

saveAnalysis(String) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Save current plug-in general state into a file (.json) specified by the outputPath.
saveAnalysis(String) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
saveAnalysis(String, AnalysisSettings) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.JSONManager
Save settings into a file (.json) specified by the outputPath.

setAutoThreshold(ImagePlus, String, boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.ThresholdingManager
Calculates and applies an automatic threshold (Otsu, Moments, etc.) to the image using the stack histogram (all slices combined) to compute the threshold.

sizeLabel - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
sliceWatcher - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
 
stack - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.PreprocessingApplyMedianWorker
The image stack to process, slice by slice.
startImageWatcher() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Starts a timer that regularly checks the status of the current image.
syncAnalysisParametersInputValues() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Synchronize the LDCService with current particle analysis input values.
syncInputValues() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Synchronize the LDCService with current particle analysis input values, used when a button of the RightPanel is pressed for a particle analysis.
syncUIWithParams() - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.PipelineSubPanel
Synchronizes the current UI class with the current analysis parameters.
syncUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Synchronizes all UI components with the current plugin parameters, restoring the selected morphological operation and watershed checkbox state.
syncUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
syncUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Synchronizes all UI components with the current plugin parameters, restoring the state of the contrast and median filter controls from the LDCService.
syncUIWithParams() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Synchronizes all UI components with the current plugin parameters, restoring the threshold method, dark background option, slider values, and refreshing the histogram display.
